overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character moves from a narrow alley past Tom's Diner, crosses streets, walks under overpasses, and navigates through pedestrian areas in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with towering glass buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with outdoor dining and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway toward a lit intersection, passing outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with 'Tom's Diner' text glowing in red and white
plastic chairs and small tables arranged on the sidewalk
red paper-style lanterns hanging outside the diner
tall brutalist concrete structure with small windows
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alleyway at night, dominated by the glowing neon sign of Tom's Diner ahead. The camera moves forward past outdoor seating on the left, with the alley walls creating an enclosed feeling. The ground is concrete sidewalk, and the area is sparsely populated.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to covered pedestrian walkway beneath overpass

events.description: exits narrow alley and begins crossing the street with yellow crosswalk markings
enters covered walkway beneath large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and entering a covered walkway under an overpass, turning slightly right

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on driving along the street ahead

entered.detail: large neon sign with 'TURBO' in orange letters mounted under the overpass
red neon sign with Japanese text 'Fuyutsuki' hanging in the distance
massive concrete overpass creating a covered walkway below
thick support pillars for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the alley and crosses a street marked with bold yellow crosswalk lines, passing a futuristic car. It then enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the 'TURBO' neon sign becomes visible. The environment shifts from enclosed alley to semi-covered urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large concrete pillars and neon advertisements

events.description: pedestrian density increases as the camera passes vending machines and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past concrete pillars and neon signs, passing other pedestrians and a vending machine

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward the camera on the right side

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying '3 Mouths Desire' with a pink and red graphic
futuristic blue and orange vending machine on the sidewalk
large yellow outdoor umbrella shading a seating area
tall palm tree visible against the building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the overpass through a corridor of thick concrete pillars, the camera passes by a '3 Mouths Desire' billboard and a futuristic vending machine. The pedestrian traffic increases, with people walking in opposing directions. Palm trees and yellow umbrellas mark small outdoor seating areas along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with tall glass buildings and digital billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open city street with towering glass skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past various storefronts and digital advertisements, following the flow of pedestrians

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
bright orange safety railings along the edge of the sidewalk
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
building front with distinctive blue paneling and large windows
futuristic traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wider city street lined with towering glass skyscrapers. The camera walks past orange safety railings and digital billboards, following the flow of pedestrians along the concrete sidewalk. The architecture shifts to modern glass and steel towers with various illuminated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with projected crosswalk markings and red-lit building facade

events.description: crossing the street at a crosswalk with green 'WALK' text projected onto the ground
approaching a building entrance with intense red neon lighting and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward a building with prominent red neon lighting, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead toward the red-lit building entrance

entered.detail: building facade bathed in intense red neon light with large entrance
large floating holographic display showing animated content
small booth or kiosk structure on the sidewalk
orange and white striped barriers blocking off an area

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a street where 'WALK' is projected in green on the crosswalk, approaching a building with intense red neon lighting. A holographic advertisement floats near the entrance, and construction barriers line the right side. The scene ends as the camera approaches the red-lit building entrance with a street kiosk visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic neon alleyway into the expansive, towering architecture of a futuristic city center. It begins by moving through a narrow passage dominated by the glow of Tom's Diner before exiting the alley to cross a street marked with bold yellow lines. As the camera passes a futuristic car, the environment shifts into a semi-covered urban corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the view is framed by thick pillars, vending machines, and the neon light of a Turbo sign. The scene then opens into a wide city street lined with glass skyscrapers and digital billboards, following a flow of pedestrians past orange safety railings. Finally, the camera crosses a street with a green projected walk signal, moving toward a building entrance bathed in intense red neon light and floating holographic advertisements.
